title: [FIRRTL] Grand Central Testharness Fixes
body:
Fix Grand Central to properly handle views/interfaces that are
instantiated in the test harness and not in the DUT.  Specifically,
interfaces and companions are not extracted via binds if they are only
instantiated in the testharness (and a DUT is known via a
MarkDUTAnnotation).

Signed-off-by: Schuyler Eldridge <schuyler.eldridge@sifive.com>

This is handling some weird corner cases around Grand Central and whether or not things are extracted and to what locations. If a DUT exists, indicated via a `MarkDUTAnnotation`, then any interface/companion which is instantiated outside of the DUT (e.g., in the test harness) should not be extracted. If no DUT exists then everything is extracted normally.  For interfaces which are in the test harness, they should be output in the test directory.
